title: Quest Plaques
description: Adds plaques for quests to Advancement Plaques.
body:
Replace those boring, anti-climactic quest popups with fancy glowing plaques.

This mod is an add-on for the Advancement Plaques mod, providing the same fancy popups for quest completion in various questing mods.

 

 (Screenshot shown using the Embellished Stone resource pack)

This mod requires Iceberg, you can download it here.  It also requires Advancement Plaques, you can download it here. 

 

Client / Server

This addon needs to be installed on both the client and server (as does Advancement Plaques).

 

Configuration

Can be configured to display plaques for any or all of the three quest "levels" (Task / Goal / Challenge).  These generally equate to tasks for multi-task quests (Task), quests (Goal), and full quest chapters (Challenge).  If you'd like plaques to only show for select quests, you can provide a list of quest IDs with the whitelist configuration option.  Additionally, there is an option to skip task plaques for quests that only have a single task.

 

 

Compatibility

Currently supports quests from FTB Quests and Custom Quests.  More quest mods may be added in the future, depending on demand.

 

Please note that this is an add-on for Advancement Plaques, so any changes via resource packs and the like will apply to plaques from Quest Plaques as well.

You are free to use this mod in modpacks.

 

Problems, feature request, something else?  Join us on Discord!
